description: TTM buyback yield ranking. 5-factor quality: gross+net yield, FCF coverage>=1x, P/E<30, 4-qtr consistency. $2B+ mcap gate. Top 20 equal-weighted portfolio quarterly rebalance. Pontiff-Woodgate 2008 (+4-6%/yr top decile). Weekly Mon 13:00 UTC.
